Operation 'deleteofficemember' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. The current description is minimal and lacks critical context. It doesn't explain what happens to related data, what permissions are required, or what the response indicates. Added details about the permanent nature of deletion, potential side effects on related entities (transactions, reports, departments), permission requirements, and response behavior to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Deletes an office member.
data.description_suggestion: Removes an office member (employee) from the specified office. This operation permanently deletes the office member record and may affect associated expense transactions, reports, and departmental assignments. Requires appropriate permissions to delete office members. Returns a success response upon completion.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks critical context. It doesn't explain what happens to related data, what permissions are required, or what the response indicates. Added details about the permanent nature of deletion, potential side effects on related entities (transactions, reports, departments), permission requirements, and response behavior to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Updates an existing expense transaction.

data.current_description: Deletes an existing expense transaction.

Requires office_id path parameter and OfficeMemberInput request body containing member details (name, email, role). Returns the newly created OfficeMember object with assigned identifier. The member becomes immediately available for expense transaction submission, report assignment, and approval workflows.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version specifies required inputs (office_id and request body structure), return value, and side effects (availability for expense workflows) to enable AI agents to understand the operation's full impact.

data.current_description: Updates an existing expense transaction.

Accepts ExTransactionCreateInput with fields to modify: amount, date, category, department, project, and description. Returns the updated ExTransaction object. data.current_description: Deletes an existing expense transaction.
